heading: Limitation on required flowdown of contract clauses to subcontractors providing commercial products or commercial services
label: 3459 Limitation on required flowdown of contract clauses to subcontractors providing commercial products or commercial services

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may not require that a clause be included in a subcontract for the acquisition of commercial products or commercial services other than a clause that is on the lists required by or unless otherwise applicable pursuant to subsection (e) of such section.section 3452 of this title

children.heading: .—Applicability to Other Supply Agreements
children.label: b .—Applicability to Other Supply Agreements
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may not require the application of any contract clauses to other supply agreements unless otherwise applicable pursuant to subsection (e) of .section 3452 of this title

children.heading: .—Definitions
children.label: c .—Definitions
children.text: In this section, the terms “other supply agreement” and “subcontract” have the meanings given such terms, respectively, in .section 3452(c)(2) of this title

children.heading: .—Applicability
children.label: d .—Applicability
children.text: Subsection (a) shall apply only with respect to subcontracts entered into after the earliest date on which the lists required by are published in the Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement.section 3452 of this title
